Params: {1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory72.jpg'}
{3: 'Following the coordinates Nanami sent, you walk into an empty warehouse outside town.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0', 4: '0.9', 5: '0'}
{3: 'All of a sudden, the huge chandelier goes dark, and the door behind you slams shut, trapping you in complete darkness.'}
{2: 'Kiat Brother A?', 3: 'Beep boop—heh ha, ha ha, dear Aparlashaw Star Person, now that you\'ve... fallen... into... our, the Kiat Brothers\'... hands—'}
{3: 'Electronic voices, cutting in and out, recite weird lines, mixed with the sharp sounds of mechanical parts moving, echoing in the dark.'}
{2: 'Kiat Brother B?', 3: 'Then you\'re doomed—Don\'t just read half of it, this part\'s important.'}
{2: 'Kiat Brother A?', 3: 'S-Sorry... *cough* Aparlashaw Star Person, now that you\'ve... fallen... into... our, the Kiat Brothers\'—'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0.4', 4: '0', 5: '0.3'}
{1: '1', 2: '??', 3: 'Dum dum dum dum! Detecting someone breaking Nanami\'s First Law of the universe—the Starlight Detective is here! Ta-da!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Suddenly, a happy, loud voice comes down from above, and right away, all the lights turn back on—'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Kiat Brothers A&B', 3: 'Wow! It\'s Starlight Detective, Lady Nanami!\nWe didn\'t even get to finish our line!', 4: '1', 5: '2'}
{3: 'In the light, the Kiat Brothers show their real forms... a mechanoid bear and a bandaged mechanoid. They look familiar.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Aha, the famous Kiat Brothers—', 4: '3'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'You think running off to VL426 would keep me from finding you?!', 4: '3'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'My Starlight Antenna, no matter when, where, or which universe! Can always—always get the Commanda—*ahem!* The Aparlashaw Star Person\'s miracle waves!', 4: '3'}
{3: 'Nanami\'s holding a sword and shield, cables hanging from her, and she comes down like a knight from a story, standing guard in front of you.'}
{2: 'Nanami, can you tell me what\'s happening?', 3: '48'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Don\'t worry, Aparla... ugh, that\'s a mouthful! I\'ll just call you Commandant instead—', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Don\'t worry, Commandant, I\'ve got this, haha!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Kiat Brother B?', 3: 'Screw you, Starlight Detective—Kiat Brothers, we messed up!', 4: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryLouDianNew.prefab', 2: '2', 3: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Kiat Brother A?', 3: 'Whoa, whoa, whoa, brother, if we just work together, and use that move, even the Starlight Detective... won\'t stand a chance!', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryBlackSmokeNew.prefab', 2: '2', 3: '2'}
{3: 'The Kiat Brothers mumble weird lines, bending all over the place, like they\'re about to attack.'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryLouDianNew.prefab', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryBlackSmokeNew.prefab', 4: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiMovie/FxUiMovieXingguang.prefab', 2: '1', 3: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Come on, you baddies! With me here, you won\'t touch the Commandant!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiMovie/FxUiMovieXingguang.prefab', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFrontNewCommon23.png', 4: '5'}
{1: 'RImgBg1Shake'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Both sides rush at each other—metal clashes in a flash, and loud clangs fill the air.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFrontNewCommon23.png', 4: '5', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStorySlash.prefab', 2: '2'}
{1: 'RImgBg1Shake'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStorySlash02.prefab', 2: '2'}
{1: 'RImgBg1Shake'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '2'}
{1: 'RImgBg1Shake'}
{1: '1', 3: 'But they\'re both moving really slowly, like they\'re holding back while grappling for a few rounds, before stepping back to where they started at just the right time.'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'What the heck, the Kiat Brothers\' "Universal Silent Force" is cheating! I can\'t find any weak spots!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'What should we do now?', 3: '140', 4: 'Detective Nanami, quick, save me!', 5: '140'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Hmm, let\'s have Nanami look up the Starlight Detective Strategy Guide—', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Got it! To beat this move, you need to equip—the Miracle Lucky Star of the Universe!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Nanami pulls up a projection screen out of nowhere and reads the walkthrough seriously, then looks at you.'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'The Miracle Lucky Star of the Universe is you, Commandant!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Because today\'s your Miracle Lucky Day, Commandant!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'While Nanami\'s talking, she comes over and hands you a put-together weapon.'}
{2: 'This is so heavy!', 3: '157', 4: 'I don\'t know how this works.', 5: '157'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'All you have to do, Commandant, is hold on tight—', 4: '1'}
{3: 'While she\'s talking, Nanami gets behind you, and you feel her arms around your waist.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryLineSpreadNew.prefab', 2: '2'}
{3: 'Instantly, Nanami\'s wheel drive roars to life behind you. Your body jerks forward as she guides you, accelerating fast, with the wind screaming past your ears—'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Let\'s go all out, Commandant!', 4: '18'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '2'}
{1: 'RImgBg1Shake'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The Kiatt Brothers barely manage to get their swords up to defend, but your "Hyper Speed Death Ray" breaks through, sending them flying.'}
{3: 'But after beating them, Nanami doesn\'t stop—she keeps going straight, charging toward a huge wall in the distance—'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Commandant! Eyes closed, eyes closed!', 4: '18'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryLineSpreadNew.prefab'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png'}
{3: 'The crash never happens. Instead, you feel... a soft breeze on your skin, and moist air on your cheeks.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryZhengyanNew.prefab', 2: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory617.jpg'}
{3: 'The speed slows down. You open your eyes to a forest full of birds singing and flowers smelling sweet. Afternoon sunlight comes through the trees, making it warm.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Then, a bunch of little mechanoids come out from behind trees, gathering around you. Looking back, you see the wall was just a hologram.'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Phew... So, in the end, Nanami rescued the Commandant, beat the Kiatt Brothers, and escaped the doomed VL426 system! And the ending scene is—TOTAL VICTORY!', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryGoldDust.prefab', 2: '2', 3: '1'}
{3: 'Nanami lets go of you and stands between you and the little mechanoids, striking a winning Cardman Rider pose with a big, bright smile.'}
{2: 'So, this was all a show?', 3: '221', 4: 'Well done, well done...', 5: '221'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryGoldDust.prefab', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Ahaha... This is the Starlight Detective 4001: First Edition Limited Performance—Nanami, Rohacchi, Martin, and everyone put this on for you, Commandant!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Martin', 3: 'Ouch, ouch, ouch, Nanami, that\'s too hard...', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Rohacchi', 3: 'Commandant, I... practiced for ages... for today.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Haha, to everyone, and to me, you\'re a really important person—really important, Commandant!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'When everyone heard your birthday was coming up, they got super excited, all saying they wanted to make a huge, thrilling surprise for you, Commandant!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Martin', 3: 'You were clearly the most excited, Nanami...', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Ahem, don\'t interrupt the director!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'So, Commandant, did you enjoy it?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Yup, very happy.', 3: '245', 4: 'It could\'ve been better with a little better acting.', 5: '245'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Yay! Everything I just said to you was from the heart, Commandant!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Commandant, you\'re the Miracle Lucky Star shining across the galaxy! No matter where you are in the universe, I will come to your rescue!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'While Nanami\'s talking, she puts her hands together and raises them up to the sun.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Everyone—are you reaaady—?', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiRestaurantPopupUpgrade/FxUiRestaurantPopupUpgrade01.prefab', 2: '1'}
